function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"scenarios": [{"given": "buildMux() has been called and a GET request to /goodbye is dispatched via httptest", "when": "the response is recorded", "then": ["the status code is 200", "the response body decodes as JSON with message='Goodbye, World!'"], "title": "Goodbye returns 200 + JSON body"}, {"given": "buildMux() has been called", "when": "a GET to /goodbye is dispatched", "then": ["the Content-Type response header is application/json"], "title": "Goodbye sets Content-Type application/json"}]}
